title: Hermes primitives as task-graph edges
decision: Hermes is out of v0. Which orchestration primitives become first-class task-graph edges is deferred to a post-v0 RFC.
unblock_condition: A post-v0 RFC mapping specific Hermes primitives to task-graph edge types with owner sign-off.
deferral_rollback_rule: Hermes primitives are excluded from the v0 task-graph edge model.
